articles.title: The Future of Web Development
articles.content:
Introduction

Web development is rapidly evolving with new technologies and frameworks.

Key Trends

  • AI-powered development tools
  • WebAssembly adoption
  • Edge computing
The future of web development is exciting and full of possibilities.

articles.title: Mastering Angular Development
articles.content:
Getting Started

Angular continues to evolve and improve with each release.

Advanced Concepts

  • Dependency Injection

  • Performance Optimization
Angular provides a robust framework for building modern web applications.
